checks.name: Helicity Evolution dH/dt
checks.note: Helicity is purely dissipative for NS (ν>0), conserved for Euler (ν=0)

checks.name: Enstrophy Evolution dZ/dt
checks.identity: dZ/dt = ∫ ω_i ω_j S_ij dx - ν∫|∇ω|² dx
checks.note: Blow-up requires vortex stretching to permanently dominate viscous dissipation

checks.name: Beltrami Alignment Identity (Lamb Vector)
checks.beltrami_consequence: Under u×ω=0: nonlinearity becomes gradient, absorbed by pressure
checks.lamb_residual: 2*(Derivative(u1(x1, x2), x2) - Derivative(u2(x1, x2), x1))*u2(x1, x2)
checks.note: NS-specific: uses ω=∇×u. Tao's averaged equations break this identity.

checks.name: Vortex Stretching Suppression
checks.note: High enstrophy → Beltrami alignment → stretching suppression. Viscosity essential (fails for Euler).

conclusions.beltrami_suppression: Under u×ω=0: nonlinearity trivializes, stretching vanishes
conclusions.tao_barrier_clearance: Proof uses ω=∇×u structure, not just energy identity
conclusions.euler_failure_mode: Without ν>0, dissipation term vanishes → no stretching suppression
